memory_items.title: Pre-Execution Structure Inspection
memory_items.lesson: Always inspect workbook structure (sheets, cell values, dimensions) before writing manipulation code
memory_items.generalization: Load the workbook programmatically and print key metadata to understand the data layout before implementing changes

memory_items.title: Type-Aware Cell Value Processing
memory_items.lesson: Check data types before applying string operations to cell values
memory_items.generalization: Validate cell value is a string using isinstance() before performing substring or regex matching operations

memory_items.title: Case-Insensitive Pattern Matching
memory_items.lesson: Text-based cell conditions should use case-insensitive comparison
memory_items.generalization: Normalize both the cell value and search patterns to uppercase/lowercase before substring matching to handle variations

memory_items.title: Output Verification Protocol
memory_items.lesson: Re-read the saved file to confirm manipulation results before finalizing
memory_items.generalization: After saving the modified workbook, reload it independently and verify the target cells contain expected values

memory_items.title: Multi-State Conditional Logic
memory_items.lesson: When one cell's value determines another cell's output based on multiple patterns, use sequential condition checks
memory_items.generalization: Chain elif statements for mutually exclusive pattern matches, initializing default value and updating based on the first matching condition

edits.content:
## 6. Conditional Logic & Pattern Matching
- **Pre-Inspection**: Before writing cell-based logic, load and print workbook structure (sheets, target cell values, dimensions) to verify assumptions.
- **Type Validation**: Always validate cell value types with isinstance() before applying string methods or regex operations.
- **Case Normalization**: For text-based conditions, normalize both cell values and search patterns to consistent casing (upper/lower) before matching.
- **Pattern Matching Chains**: Use sequential if-elif chains for mutually exclusive conditions mapping input cell values to output cell values.
- **Default Handling**: Initialize output variables to None/default and only update when conditions match; set explicitly if no match found.
- **Verification Loop**: After saving the workbook, reload it from disk to independently verify target cells contain expected values before completing the task.
